name: Omar
manager_notes: Omar hits everything I give him and the quality is solid, but the spark has gone. He used to jump into design discussions; lately he's quiet, does the ticket, moves on. Nothing is wrong with his work so I almost didn't flag it. I want to understand whether he's gone quiet because he's bored, checked out, or just heads-down — and whether there's something more stretching he actually wants.
answers: Work's fine, I'm getting through everything no problem.
I guess I've stopped putting my hand up for the bigger discussions.
It's not that I'm unhappy, it's just kind of routine now.
The tickets feel samey, I could do them in my sleep.
I haven't really thought about what I'd want instead.
Maybe something I haven't done before would help, yeah.
I don't need more work, I'd want different work.
A stretch project would probably wake me back up.
Even owning one new area would change how this feels.
